# Minakshi Makeup & Hair — Professional Bridal Makeup Artist in Mumbai

> Mumbai's most trusted bridal makeup artist with 8+ years of experience, 500+ happy brides, and a 4.9★ Google rating (171+ reviews). Available for destination weddings globally.

## About

Minakshi is a professional bridal makeup artist based in Mumbai, India. With over 8 years of hands-on experience and 500+ happy brides, she specializes in multi-cultural bridal artistry — Marathi, South Indian, Bengali, North Indian, and modern glam styles.

She is known for HD and natural finish bridal makeup that lasts all day, from the vows to the last dance. Her work requires no filters and no editing — just pure artistry.

- **Name:** Minakshi Makeup & Hair
- **Owner:** Minakshi
- **Location:** Mumbai, Maharashtra, India
- **Available:** Globally for destination weddings
- **Experience:** 8+ years
- **Happy Brides:** 500+
- **Google Rating:** 4.9★ (171+ verified reviews)
- **Phone:** +91 91722 35347
- **Email:** minakshimakeupandhair@gmail.com
- **Instagram:** @minakshimakeupandhair
- **Website:** https://mgmakeupandhair.in

## Services and Pricing

### Bridal Makeup & Hair — HD / Natural
Your special day deserves a flawless look — choose HD for camera-perfect finish or Natural for a soft, radiant glow. Every culture, every style. Includes trial session.
- Tags: HD Finish, Natural Look, Trial Session
- Most Popular Service

### Pre / Post Wedding Functions
From Haldi & Mehendi to Reception — stunning looks for every function before and after the big day.
- Tags: Engagement, Haldi, Reception

### Party Makeup & Hair
Glamorous looks for every occasion — cocktail nights, festive celebrations, and special evenings out.
- Tags: Evening Glam, Long-lasting, Photo-ready

### Baby Shower / Birthday Makeup & Hair
Soft, glowing makeup for your special celebration. Gentle products with a radiant, picture-perfect finish.
- Tags: Soft Glam, Gentle Products, Natural Glow

### Makeup Classes / Workshops
Learn professional makeup techniques from an expert. Perfect for beginners and aspiring artists — hands-on training with premium products.
- Courses: Self Makeup Pro (1 Day), Bridal Masterclass (3 Days), Professional Artist Course (5 Days)
- All courses include Certificate of Completion
- Tags: Hands-on Training, Beginner Friendly, Certificate

### Destination Bridal Makeup
Dream destination wedding? We travel with you! Full bridal makeup & hair services wherever your celebration takes you.
- Tags: Travel Ready, Full Coverage, Destination

## Makeup Classes — Certified Courses

### Self Makeup Pro — 1 Day Course
Learn your face, master everyday & party looks. Perfect for beginners who want to do their own makeup like a pro. Certificate included.

### Bridal Masterclass — 3 Day Course (Most Popular)
Full bridal, reception & engagement looks. Product knowledge, humidity-proof base techniques, and complete styling. Certificate included.

### Professional Artist Course — 5 Day Course
From beginner to paid artist. Client handling, pricing, hygiene + certificate + professional photoshoot included. "Certified Makeup Artist" certificate for professional use.

All products provided in class. Small batches for personal attention.

## Google Reviews — Real Client Testimonials

**4.9★ Average Rating | 171+ Verified Reviews**

- **Shubhangi Gawas** (5★ — Bridal Makeup): "Absolutely in love with my bridal makeup! She understood my requirements perfectly and delivered exactly what I had envisioned. The makeup was flawless, elegant, and long-lasting."

- **Khushboo Chaurasia** (5★ — Bridal Makeup): "I couldn't have asked for a better makeup artist for my special day. She understood exactly what I wanted and enhanced my features so beautifully while keeping the look elegant and natural."

- **Rupa Borkar** (5★ — Engagement Makeup): "Had the most amazing experience with Minakshi for my event! She's so talented, patient, and made me feel incredibly comfortable. The makeup was natural yet glam, photographed beautifully."

- **Aparna Panigrahy** (5★ — Engagement Makeup): "Absolutely loved her work! She created the exact engagement look I had envisioned — and honestly, even better than I imagined. Her attention to detail is amazing."

- **Poornima Nalavade** (5★ — Party Makeup): "Thank you so much for the amazing makeup! I loved how you kept it so natural yet radiant. It lasted all day/night. You are truly very talented!"

- **Namrata Purabia** (5★ — Bridal Makeup): "I found you on the map, and you turned out to be the best find ever. Thank you for making me look so beautiful on my special day."

## Key Facts

- 500+ brides served across all cultures
- 5-star Google rating with 171+ verified reviews
- 3M and Avery Dennison certified products used
- Available for destination weddings globally
- 50+ destination weddings completed
- Specializes in Indian skin tones and humidity-proof base
- No-filter, no-editing policy — all portfolio images are real

## Service Area

Mumbai and all of Maharashtra, including Vasai-Virar, Thane, Navi Mumbai, Pune. Available globally for destination weddings — Pan India and international.
